description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a gable roof covered in dark, weathered shingles, featuring a prominent stone chimney. The front facade is constructed from stacked logs with visible round log ends at the corners, and a central wooden door made from horizontal planks. The side walls combine log construction with stonework, and each side has a single rectangular window with wooden shutters. Moss and weathering are visible on the lower logs, adding to the aged appearance. The roof has a slight overhang and is textured with overlapping shingles, while the chimney is built from rough stone blocks. The overall structure is compact and sturdy, evoking a traditional woodland or rural aesthetic.
description: A compact, rustic log cabin with a gable shingle roof, stone chimney, and wooden plank door, featuring log and stone walls with shuttered windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central wooden plank door, log corners, and the gable roof with the stone chimney visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a rectangular window with wooden shutters, log wall construction, and the full expanse of the shingled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a stone wall with a single shuttered window and log corners, with the gable roof and chimney visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a plain log wall without windows or doors, and the roof with the chimney at the center.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhang, covered in dark, weathered shingles and featuring a stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows with wooden shutters, one on each side wall, symmetrically placed near the center of each side
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade beneath the gable
